name: Sarah Mitchell
bio: My best friend from college. We used to pull all-nighters for exams and now we barely talk. She's a pediatric nurse and an amazing human being.

name: Marcus Johnson
bio: My first manager at my internship. He taught me everything I know about software architecture. We still grab coffee every few weeks.

name: Emma Wilson
bio: Former colleague, great mentor. We worked together at the same startup for 3 years. Now she runs her own design studio in Berlin.

name: David Kim
bio: Met David at a hiking meetup two years ago. We've since done three multi-day trails together. He's an aerospace engineer by day, adventurer by heart.

name: Priya Nair
bio: Priya and I were lab partners in our data structures class. She's now a data scientist at a major fintech company and we regularly swap career advice.

name: Tom Baker
bio: Tom was my neighbor for five years. We used to watch football every Sunday. He moved away last year but deserves a proper check-in call.

name: Olivia Martinez
bio: We met at the company gym at 6 AM. Olivia is a UX researcher who gives the most brutally honest design feedback. Also an amazing salsa dancer.

name: Ryan O'Brien
bio: Ryan's been my roommate, my bandmate, and my emergency contact at some point. He plays bass guitar in a local band and teaches music on weekends.
